package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareAndHandlerTranslateSameErrorDomain() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_and_handler_translate_same_error_domain"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Double translation layers where middleware and handlers both map the same error family to responses."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
